column1: 1 Circuity is from a sample of OD points with network distance matched to average commute distance
* Circuitry is from 2001 commute distance; 1995 commute distance unavailable
Network Speed (congested), Network Speed (freeflow), Population: TTI complete data 1982-2007 (calculated from 1995 values only)
Circuity: Networks are Census Tiger 2008 county-level shapefiles merged together, commute distances are from 1995 NPTS
Urbanized Area: Census 1990 Population and Housing Unit Counts (census.gov)
Employment: 1998 MSA Business Patterns (NAICS - from Censtats)
